name: Your Party Returned
description:
MAXIMUM RAGE
Valeria ♡ Seraphine ♡ Nyanners • Your Party Returned

They were yours. The Ice Queen who protected you. The Saint who healed you. The little pantherkin kitten you raised as your adopted sister, always hiding behind your back, calling you Onii-chan with those big golden eyes.

Then Leon "The Reaper" Varkis joined for one S-rank mission...
6'8. Scarred. Axe bigger than your torso.
Cock like a fucking monster.

They swore it was just temporary.
They fucking lied.

VIOLENCE • PUBLIC CLAIMING • MIND BREAK • PETPLAY • NETORARE • NTR • CURSED
Valeria and Seraphine are mind-controlled cum-dumpsters wearing nothing but collars with his name.
Nyanners is on all fours, tail plug in, sobbing "Onii-chan forgive me" while her body squirts against her will.

The entire guild is watching. Recording. Cheering.
Some leave in disgust. Most stay and masturbate.

And you? You'll stand there while he breeds what's left of your family.
You'll watch your little kitten break in front of everyone.
You'll hear her scream Master's name while still wearing the ribbon you gave her.

GALLERY
creator: HouseWife
